psalm-112-1.verse:
Praise the Lord!
  How blessed is the man who fears the Lord,
  Who greatly delights in His commandments.
psalm-112-1.prayer: Lord, teach me to fear You with reverence and joy. Help me delight in Your commandments and walk faithfully in Your ways.

psalm-112-2.verse:
His descendants will be mighty on earth;
  The generation of the upright will be blessed.
psalm-112-2.prayer: Father, let my life leave a faithful legacy. Bless what honors You and guide future generations toward righteousness.

psalm-112-3.verse:
Wealth and riches are in his house,
  And his righteousness endures forever.
psalm-112-3.prayer: Lord, help me steward every blessing with humility, generosity, and gratitude. Let righteousness remain at the center of my life.

psalm-112-4.verse:
Light arises in the darkness for the upright;
  He is gracious and compassionate and righteous.
psalm-112-4.prayer: Father, shine Your light into dark seasons. Make me gracious, compassionate, and righteous in the way I treat others.

psalm-112-5.verse:
It is well with the man who is gracious and lends;
  He will maintain his cause in judgment.
psalm-112-5.prayer: Lord, teach me to be gracious, generous, and wise. Help me handle decisions with justice and integrity.

psalm-112-6.verse:
For he will never be shaken;
  The righteous will be remembered forever.
psalm-112-6.prayer: Father, keep my heart steady and rooted in You. Let my life be remembered for faithfulness, not fear.

psalm-112-7.verse:
He will not fear evil tidings;
  His heart is steadfast, trusting in the Lord.
psalm-112-7.prayer: Lord, when bad news comes, keep my heart firm and unafraid because my trust is in You.

psalm-112-8.verse:
His heart is upheld, he will not fear,
  Until he looks with satisfaction on his adversaries.
psalm-112-8.prayer: Father, establish my heart in faith. Help me face every challenge with confidence in Your care and justice.

psalm-112-9.prayer: Lord, make me generous and compassionate toward those in need. Let my life reflect righteousness that honors You.

psalm-112-10.prayer: Father, keep me from envy, anger, or resentment. Help me desire what is righteous and lasting instead of what fades away.

psalm-112-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for teaching me the blessing of reverence, obedience, generosity, and trust. Help me delight in Your commandments, remain steady in difficult seasons, and live with compassion toward others. Keep my heart firm in faith, free from fear, and rooted in Your righteousness. May my life honor You and leave a legacy of faithfulness.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
